nodes.name: 梅拉图斯山脉
nodes.summary: 梅拉图斯山脉（Meratus）位于印度尼西亚南加里曼丹省。山脉南北弧形走向，将南加里曼丹省分为两部分。其最高峰海拔1892米。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Chestnut-hooded laughingthrush
nodes.summary: Chestnut-hooded laughingthrush（Chestnut-hooded laughingthrush，学名 Pterorhinus treacheri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于梅拉图斯山脉、次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chestnut-hooded laughingthrush is endemic to Borneo, where it is found in the north-central mountain ranges from Mount Kinabalu to Barito Ulu, along with the Meratus Mountains in the southeast of the island

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits evergreen montane forest and hill forest, forest edge, secondary forest, disturbed vegetation, and cultivated areas such as short growth in old rice fields

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits evergreen montane forest and hill forest, forest edge, secondary forest, disturbed vegetation, and cultivated areas such as short growth in old rice fields

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is classified as being of least concern by the International Union for Conservation of Nature due to its very large range, fairly large population, and a lack of significant population decline, but its numbers are thought to be decreasing and it is threatened by habitat destruction and habitat fragmentation
